dropped_summary: Both frames show a transcript-based interface with overlaid speaker avatars and highlighted text snippets, lacking visible slides, diagrams, documents, or clear visual teaching artifacts. The content is primarily textual and conversational, not a material visual representation suitable for course distillation. Lecturer-only views and low-information frames are excluded as per criteria.
